emails.body: Hey, I was an invited guest. It wasn't my party! Sounds like someone is trying to weasel herself out of trouble. Marie Heard Senior Legal Specialist Enron Broadband Services Phone: (713) 853-3907 Fax: (713) 646-8537 Marie_Heard@Enron.net Genia FitzGerald@ECT 10/10/00 03:23 PM

emails.body: You are both wrong, it is Reggie's fault, he told me not to hang around either of you!!!!! Marie Heard@ENRON COMMUNICATIONS 10/10/2000 04:21 PM
